mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS applyId, v.id AS visitId, a.subject AS title, a.visitor_company AS unit, a.industry, a.status AS status, a.start_time AS startTime, a.customer_count AS customerCount, a.internal_count AS internalCount, COALESCE(p.photo_count, 0) AS photoCount FROM eh_apply a LEFT JOIN eh_visit_record v ON v.apply_id = a.id AND v.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COALESCE(p.apply_id, vr.apply_id) AS apply_id, COUNT(*) AS photo_count FROM eh_visit_photo p LEFT JOIN eh_visit_record vr ON vr.id = p.visit_id AND vr.del_flag = '0' WHERE p.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY COALESCE(p.apply_id, vr.apply_id) ) p ON p.apply_id = a.id WHERE a.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY a.start_time DESC
